item.title: Compounding Information for States
item.description: FDA collaborates with state officials in a variety of ways, including by sharing information about compounders who engage in poor practices that could put patients at risk.
item.dc:creator: FDA

item.title: Fiscal Year 2026 Generic Drug Science and Research Initiatives Public Workshop - 06/08/2026
item.description: This workshop provides an overview of the status of science and research initiatives for generic drugs and an opportunity for public input on these initiatives.
item.dc:creator: FDA
